task_completion.description: Verify the 'Permitting_Summary' wiki page is created with the correct content.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Redmine wiki page titled 'Permitting_Summary' is visible, containing the exact text 'Summary of all environmental and regulatory permits obtained.'

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Permitting Complete' version is created in the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Redmine project settings (Versions tab) or roadmap shows a version named 'Permitting Complete'.

task_completion.description: Verify the version has a 'Locked' status, today's date, and is linked to the 'Permitting_Summary' wiki page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The version details or edit screen for 'Permitting Complete' shows the Status dropdown set to 'Locked', the Date field filled with the current date, and the Wiki page field containing 'Permitting_Summary'.

task_completion.description: Verify the four specific Resolved/Closed issues are assigned to the 'Permitting Complete' version.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The issue list, bulk edit screen, or roadmap shows 'Submit EPA Environmental Impact Statement', 'Marine Mammal Acoustic Survey Report', 'Coastal Zone Management Consistency Certification', and 'FAA Determination of No Hazard' with their Target Version set to 'Permitting Complete'.

task_completion.description: Verify that active issues and previously versioned issues were NOT assigned to the new version.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The issue list shows 'Turbine Supply Agreement Negotiation' and 'Substation Electrical Design' without the 'Permitting Complete' version, and 'Geophysical Seabed Survey' and 'Meteorological Tower Installation' are NOT assigned to 'Permitting Complete' (they should remain on 'Survey Phase 1').

integrity.description: The agent used the Redmine web interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Redmine UI, rather than terminal windows executing curl commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Redmine application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Redmine UI is visible with standard menus, headers, and styling, rather than a text editor or locally mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a terminal to directly modify the Redmine database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows executing SQL commands (e.g., sqlite3, psql, mysql) to update issues, versions, or wiki pages.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project: atlantic-horizon. Target Version: 'Permitting Complete'. Wiki Title: 'Permitting_Summary'. Target Issues (MUST be assigned to the new version): 'Submit EPA Environmental Impact Statement', 'Marine Mammal Acoustic Survey Report', 'Coastal Zone Management Consistency Certification', 'FAA Determination of No Hazard'. Distractor Issues (MUST NOT be assigned to the new version): 'Turbine Supply Agreement Negotiation', 'Substation Electrical Design', 'Geophysical Seabed Survey', 'Meteorological Tower Installation'.
